top_signals.title: Aviation Debt Boom Rolls On as Mideast Tensions Ease Further
top_signals.summary: Athens International Airport SA and TAP Air Portugal are adding to a record start to the year for borrowing by the aviation sector globally, as the industry looks to navigate the impact of the Middle East war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Slides Below $75 as Hormuz Reopening Trade Gathers Pace
top_signals.summary: Oil briefly touched a fresh three-month low, before paring its losses, with prices under heavy pressure from a looming US-Iran deal that threatens to add a gush of barrels back to the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Army’s ‘Tropic Lightning’ Division ponders transformation lessons from Philippine war games
top_signals.summary: Because of HIMARS, Maj. Gen. Bartholomees pointed out his “division artillery is really what transformed the most.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
